sapphire.title: The world of sapphire
sapphire.subtitle: Everything you need to know about this precious stone

what.title: What is a sapphire?
what.text: Sapphire is a variety of corundum (Al₂O₃) that owes its colour to titanium and iron impurities. It is one of the four recognised precious stones alongside diamond, emerald and ruby.

colors.title: Sapphire colours
colors.text: Although blue is the most well-known colour, sapphire exists in almost every colour: pink, yellow, white, green, orange (padparadscha)...

origins.title: Major origins
origins.text: Kashmir, Burma, Sri Lanka, Madagascar and Australia are among the most prestigious origins. Each terroir gives the sapphire its unique characteristics.

quality.title: How to evaluate a sapphire?
quality.text: The 4Cs also apply to sapphires: Colour, Clarity, Cut and Carat weight. Colour is the predominant criterion.

expertise.title: Expertise service
expertise.subtitle: Have your stones assessed by our certified gemmologists
expertise.description: Do you own a sapphire or precious stone whose value or authenticity you wish to verify? Our expert gemmologists are here to help.
